ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the member has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "productivity_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the target belongs to */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year the target is set for */,
  "target_month" INTEGER /* Month the target is set for */,
  "target_sales" INTEGER /* Target sales for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productivity_targets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "productivity" (
  "productivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each productivity record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "work_days" INTEGER /* Number of working days in a month */,
  "productivity_level" INTEGER /* Productivity level of the team */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales generated by the team */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target the productivity record belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productivity_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productivity_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES productivity_targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the sale */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dashboard record */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales for the team on the given date */,
  "productivity_level" INTEGER /* Productivity level of the team on the given date */,
  "target_sales" INTEGER /* Target sales for the team on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
